title: Disco
description: Add custom music discs to Minecraft
body:
# Disco

Disco is a modular music disc loader. It doesn't add any music discs by default, that part is up to you. You provide the assets (like sound files, textures, and translations) and Disco registers them as individual disc items that can be played.

## Usage

The recommended way to create addons is to use the [Disco web app]. It lets you store multiple drafts, convert resources into the correct formats, and compile the final addon jar, all in one place.

Alternatively, you can read the [wiki] to learn how to make one manually.

To install an addon, simply place it in the fabric `mods` directory.

[disco web app]: https://disco.auxves.dev
[wiki]: https://github.com/auxves/disco/wiki
